name: Boon of Combat Prowess
description: You fight with near-supernatural precision. When you miss with an attack roll, you can turn it into a hit a limited number of times per long rest.

name: Boon of Dimensional Travel
description: Space bends at your command. As a bonus action, you can teleport up to 30 feet a limited number of times per long rest.

name: Boon of Energy Resistance
description: Elemental forces barely touch you. You gain resistance to one damage type of your choice and can further reduce damage of that type once per turn.

name: Boon of Fate
description: You subtly twist destiny around you. When a creature within 60 feet makes a d20 roll, you can add or subtract a d10 from the result a limited number of times per long rest.

name: Boon of Fortitude
description: Your vitality borders on mythic. Your maximum hit points increase, and once per long rest you can drop to 1 hit point instead of 0.

name: Boon of Irresistible Offense
description: Your attacks ignore mortal limits. Your attacks bypass resistance to their damage type and treat immunity as resistance.

name: Boon of Luck
description: Fortune clings to you. When you fail a d20 test, you can reroll it a limited number of times per long rest.

name: Boon of Recovery
description: You rebound from harm with astonishing speed. As a bonus action, you can regain a substantial number of hit points once per long rest.

name: Boon of Skill
description: Your expertise is peerless. You gain proficiency in all skills and add a bonus die to ability checks.

name: Boon of Speed
description: You move with lightning swiftness. Your walking speed increases significantly and opportunity attacks against you have disadvantage.

name: Boon of Spell Recall
description: Magic returns to your mind effortlessly. Once per long rest, you can regain a spent spell slot of mid level or lower without resting.

name: Boon of Truesight
description: Your senses pierce illusion and shadow. You gain truesight out to a significant range (commonly 60 feet), letting you see invisible creatures and see through illusions and magical darkness.

name: Boon of the Night Spirit
description: Darkness empowers and conceals you. You gain enhanced darkvision and can become invisible in dim light or darkness a limited number of times per long rest.

name: Archery
description: Gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls made with Ranged weapons

name: Blind Fighting
description: Gain Blindsight with a range of 10 ft

name: Defense
description: While wearing Light, Medium, or Heavy armor, gain a +1 bonus to AC

name: Dueling
description: When holding a Melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with that weapon

name: Great Weapon Fighting
description: When rolling damage for a Two-Handed/Versatile Melee weapon, treat any 1 or 2 on a damage die as a 3

name: Interception
description: When ally within 5 ft is hit, Reaction to reduce damage dealt by 1d10 plus your Proficiency Bonus (Shield or Weapon)

name: Protection
description: Interpose shield to impose Disadvantage on all attack rolls against an ally within 5 ft until your next turn

name: Thrown Weapon Fighting
description: Gain a +2 bonus to the damage roll when hitting with a ranged attack using a weapon with the Thrown property

name: Two-Weapon Fighting
description: When making the extra attack using a Light weapon, add your ability modifier to the damage roll

name: Unarmed Fighting
description: Unarmed Strike damage 1d6 + Str mod (1d8 if hands free). Deal 1d4 Bludgeoning damage to one Grappled creature (1/turn)

name: Ability Score Improvement
description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1 (max 20)

name: Actor
description: +1 Cha. Advantage on Deception/Performance while disguised. Mimicry must pass Wisdom (Insight) check to be seen as faked

name: Athlete
description: +1 Str or Dex. Gain Climb Speed. Stand up with 5 ft movement. Make running Jumps after moving 5 ft

name: Charger
description: +1 Str or Dex. Your Dash movement distance increases by 10 ft. If you move 10+ ft in a straight line immediately before a melee hit
column6: the hit deals +1d8 damage or pushes the target 10 ft (1/turn)

name: Chef
description: +1 Con or Wis. Gain proficiency with Cook's Utensils. During a Short or Long Rest
column6: you can cook for up to 4 creatures plus your Proficiency Bonus; each creature that eats the food regains an extra 1d8 HP in addition to any Hit Dice spent. You can also prepare bolstering treats that grant Temporary HP equal to your Proficiency Bonus

name: Crossbow Expert
description: +1 Dex. Ignore the Loading property of crossbows. You do not have Disadvantage on attacks with crossbows while in melee. When you make the extra attack with a crossbow
column6: you add your ability modifier to the extra attack's damage

name: Crusher
description: +1 Str or Con. Bludgeoning hit pushes target 5 ft (1/turn). Critical Bludgeoning hit grants Advantage on attacks vs target

name: Defensive Duelist
description: +1 Dex. Holding Finesse weapon, use Reaction when hit by melee attack to add Proficiency Bonus to AC, possibly causing a miss

name: Dual Wielder
description: +1 Str or Dex. Extra attack works with any non-Two-Handed melee weapon. You can draw/stow two weapons

name: Durable
description: +1 Con. You have Advantage on Death Saves. Once per turn
column6: you can take a Bonus Action to spend a Hit Die and regain HP equal to the result

name: Elemental Adept
prerequisites: Level 4+, Spellcasting or Pact Magic Feature
description: +1 Int, Wis, or Cha. Choose one damage type: acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder. Your spells ignore Resistance to the chosen type, and damage dice for spells of that type treat 1s as 2s

name: Fey-Touched
description: +1 Int, Wis, or Cha. Misty Step and one 1st-level Divination/Enchantment spell prepared. Cast each for free 1/Long Rest

name: Grappler
description: +1 Str or Dex. Once per turn
column6: when you hit with an Unarmed Strike as a melee attack
column7: you can both deal damage and Grapple the target. You have Advantage on attacks against a Grappled target
column8: and you can move a Grappled target with you

name: Great Weapon Master
description: +1 Str. Every hit you make with a Heavy weapon deals extra damage equal to your Proficiency Bonus. When you score a Critical Hit or reduce a creature to 0 HP with a Heavy weapon
column6: you can make one attack as a Bonus Action

name: Heavily Armored
description: +1 Str or Con. Gain proficiency with Heavy armor

name: Heavy Armor Master
description: +1 Str or Con. While wearing Heavy armor, reduce Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage taken by Proficiency Bonus

name: Inspiring Leader
description: +1 Wis or Cha. After a Short or Long Rest, you can take an Action to inspire up to six creatures. Each target gains Temporary HP equal to your character level plus your Wisdom or Charisma modifier, using the modifier of the ability increased by this feat

name: Keen Mind
description: +1 Int. Choose Arcana, History, Investigation, Nature, or Religion. You gain proficiency in the chosen skill, or Expertise in it if you are already proficient. You can take the Study Action as a Bonus Action

name: Lightly Armored
description: +1 Str or Dex. Gain proficiency with Light armor and Shields

name: Mage Slayer
description: +1 Str or Dex. When you damage a creature that is concentrating
column6: that creature has Disadvantage on its Concentration save. Once per Rest
column7: you can turn a failed Int
column9: or Cha save into a success

name: Martial Weapon Training
description: +1 Str or Dex. Gain proficiency with Martial weapons

name: Medium Armor Master
description: +1 Str or Dex. While wearing Medium armor, add 3 to AC (instead of 2) if Dexterity score is 16 or higher

name: Moderately Armored
description: +1 Str or Dex. Gain proficiency with Medium armor

name: Mounted Combatant
description: +1 Str, Dex, or Wis. You have Advantage on attacks against smaller unmounted creatures. When you are riding a mount and you are the target of an effect that allows a Dexterity save, your mount takes only half damage on a failed save

name: Observant
description: +1 Int or Wis. Choose Insight, Investigation, or Perception. You gain proficiency in the chosen skill, or Expertise in it if you are already proficient. You can take the Search Action as a Bonus Action

name: Piercer
description: +1 Str or Dex. Piercing hit to reroll one damage die (1/turn). Critical Piercing hit rolls one additional damage die

name: Poisoner
description: +1 Dex or Int. Your Poison damage ignores Resistance. After a Long Rest
column6: you can brew one poison dose worth 50 GP that deals 2d8 Poison damage

name: Polearm Master
description: +1 Str or Dex. Bonus Action to extra attack (d4) with polearm end. Reaction to attack a creature entering your weapon reach

name: Resilient
description: +1 to one ability score lacking save proficiency. Gain Saving Throw Proficiency with that chosen ability

name: Ritual Caster
description: +1 Int, Wis, or Cha. A number of level 1 Ritual spells equal to your Proficiency Bonus are always prepared for you. You can cast those spells with any spell slots you have. You can also cast one prepared Ritual quickly for free once per Long Rest

name: Sentinel
description: +1 Str or Dex. OA vs creature that Disengages/hits ally. OA hit reduces target's Speed to 0 for the rest of the turn

name: Shadow-Touched
description: +1 Int, Wis, or Cha. Invisibility and one 1st-level Illusion/Necromancy spell prepared. Cast each for free 1/Long Rest

name: Sharpshooter
description: +1 Dex. Ranged attacks ignore Half/Three-Quarters Cover. No Disadvantage in melee or when attacking at long range

name: Shield Master
description: +1 Str. Shield Bash to push 5 ft or Prone (1/turn). Reaction to take no damage on successful Dexterity save

name: Skill Expert
description: +1 one Ability. Gain proficiency in one skill. Gain Expertise in one skill you are already proficient in

name: Skulker
description: +1 Dex. You gain Blindsight with a range of 10 ft. You have Advantage on any Stealth check made as part of the Hide Action during combat. Missing an attack while Hidden doesn't reveal your location

name: Slasher
description: +1 Str or Dex. Slashing hit reduces Speed by 10 ft (1/turn). Critical Slashing hit imposes Disadvantage on target's attack

name: Speedy
description: +1 Dex or Con. Speed +10 ft. Dash ignores Difficult Terrain. Opportunity Attacks against you have Disadvantage

name: Spell Sniper
prerequisites: Level 4+, Spellcasting or Pact Magic Feature
description: +1 Int, Wis, or Cha. Spell attacks ignore Cover. No Disadvantage in melee. Increase attack spell range (10+ ft) by 60 ft

name: Telekinetic
description: +1 Int, Wis, or Cha. You learn Mage Hand; it is invisible, and its range increases by 30 ft. As a Bonus Action, you can force a target to make a Strength save against your spell save DC or be shoved 5 ft

name: Telepathic
description: +1 Int, Wis, or Cha. You can speak telepathically to one creature within 60 ft that shares a language with you. Detect Thoughts is prepared for you, and you can cast it for free once per Long Rest

name: War Caster
prerequisites: Level 4+, Spellcasting or Pact Magic Feature
description: +1 Int, Wis, or Cha. Advantage on Concentration saves. Reaction to cast spell instead of OA. Somatic with hands busy

name: Weapon Master
description: +1 Str or Dex. Choose one weapon type with which you are proficient. You can use that weapon type's Mastery property
column6: and you can change the chosen weapon type after a Long Rest

name: Alert
description: Add Proficiency Bonus to Initiative roll. Swap Initiative with one willing ally immediately after rolling

name: Crafter
description: Proficiency with 3 Artisan's Tools. 20% discount on nonmagical items. Craft one piece of temporary gear after a Long Rest

name: Healer
description: Ally spends one Hit Die and gains HP = roll + your Proficiency Bonus. Reroll 1s when determining HP restored

name: Lucky
description: Spend 1 Luck Point for Advantage on a D20 Test or to impose Disadvantage on an attack against you

name: Magic Initiate
description: Learn 2 cantrips and 1 1st-level spell (Cleric, Druid, or Wizard). Cast the 1st-level spell for free 1/Long Rest

name: Musician
description: Proficiency with 3 Musical Instruments. Finish a Rest, grant Heroic Inspiration to allies (number equals Proficiency Bonus)

name: Savage Attacker
description: When hitting with a weapon, roll the weapon's damage dice twice and use either roll against the target (1/turn)

name: Skilled
description: Gain proficiency in any combination of three skills or tools of your choice

name: Tavern Brawler
description: Unarmed Strike deals 1d4 + Str mod (reroll 1s). Prof with improvised weapons. Unarmed Strike hit allows 5 ft push (1/turn)

name: Tough
description: Max HP increases by double your current level, plus 2 HP every time you gain a level thereafter
